title: JV-15 - Security and privacy audit for MT logs, benchmark artifacts, and fallback consent

labels.name: priority:P0
labels.description: Must-have for the first usable product increment

labels.name: level: atomic
labels.description: Small independent execution slice that can be assigned directly

labels.name: area: privacy
labels.description: Privacy, retention, consent, and local data protection

body:
## Summary

Audit local MT and benchmark surfaces for source text, translated text, API key, model path, and fallback-consent leaks.

## Why is this needed?

Meeting text and Google API keys are sensitive; benchmark artifacts and logs must not leak them.

## Current context

This WBS comes from tentacle research on 2026-05-21. Current repo state: mt_provider still defaults to google; src/bin/mt_bench.rs emits a pending lf-04-v1 fixture; local OPUS-MT provider exists behind local-mt but lacks benchmark-proven realtime replacement evidence; config has explicit mt_cloud_fallback consent; #372 closed with routing/fixture only; #383 tracks 60fps render performance; PR #407 aligns docs with local-first STT but does not make local MT default.

## Inputs

- Provider/runtime changes from JV-11/JV-12.
- Benchmark artifacts from JV-03/JV-04/JV-05.
- PRIVACY.md and config behavior.
- tui-security-auditor agent.

## Outputs

- Security audit report with CLEAN/BLOCKED verdict.
- Automated redaction/privacy tests.
- Docs updates for privacy and fallback behavior if needed.

## Implementation approach

- Search tracing/logs/artifacts for raw source text, translated text, API key patterns, bearer tokens, and unsafe paths.
- Verify mt_cloud_fallback explicit consent is preserved.
- Verify model downloader validates hashes and rejects traversal.
- Confirm benchmark raw rows use hashes or approved fixtures.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] No production log or evidence artifact contains API keys or meeting text unless explicitly approved fixture text.
- [ ] Cloud fallback requires explicit config consent and key.
- [ ] Downloader/cache writes are path-safe.
- [ ] Security auditor verdict CLEAN.

## Test cases / evidence gates

- [ ] Secret-detector over repo and evidence outputs.
- [ ] Fallback call-count tests.
- [ ] Artifact redaction tests.
- [ ] Path traversal tests.
- [ ] Manual review checklist recorded.

## Dependencies

- Depends on JV-03 and JV-11/JV-12.
- Blocks JV-13 and release promotion.

## Agent routing

tui-security-auditor on opus-class; independent nfr-verification-gate cross-check.

## Project / WBS

- WBS key: JV-15
- Wave: V1 security
- Project target: magicpro97/project/2
- Labels: type: testing, area: privacy, area: verification, area: providers, priority:P0, level: atomic

## Duplicate / extension note

New audit scope specific to local MT replacement and benchmark artifacts.
